---
name: Share a Directive
about: Share a working YAML directive for a website so others can use it
title: "[directive] <site name>"
labels: directive
assignees: ''
---

## Site

URL and brief description of what this directive scrapes.

## Directive YAML

```yaml
# paste your directive here
```

## Notes

- Any quirks, limitations, or things to be aware of?
- Does it require a specific backend (playwright vs bs4)?
- Does the site have rate limiting or CAPTCHAs?

## Would you like to open a PR to add it to the repo?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, just sharing
